title: laurentia longiflora var. runcinata
intro: Laurentia longiflora var. runcinata, commonly known as the "runcinate blue shell flower", is a variety of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, as well as being used topically to treat skin irritations and wounds. Laurentia longiflora var. runcinata can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy in traditional medicine.
